name: pi-skills-manager
description: Polished Pi skills manager with a dedicated /skills menu for browsing, previewing, inserting, creating, editing, renaming, deleting, and toggling skills.

settings.label: Enable skills manager
settings.description: Register /skills, marker expansion, startup skill-list hiding, and skills management UI. If disabled, /skills enable remains available as a recovery command.

settings.label: Hide native /skill commands
settings.description: Write enableSkillCommands=false to the matching Pi settings scope so the main slash menu stays clean and /skills becomes the skill entrypoint.

settings.label: Hide startup skills block
settings.description: Hide Pi's built-in startup [Skills] list so skills are managed through the dedicated menu instead.

settings.label: Clean incomplete markers
settings.description: Remove partial [skill] marker fragments from the editor after aborted menu insertions when Pi exposes terminal-input hooks.

settings.label: AI skill generation
settings.description: Use the currently selected model/thinking level to draft new SKILL.md files. If unavailable or disabled, a deterministic fallback template is used.

settings.label: Default create location
settings.description: Initial visibility choice when creating a skill.

settings.label: Popup width
settings.description: Preferred overlay width. Accepts a number of columns or a percentage string such as 82%.

settings.label: Popup max height
settings.description: Maximum overlay height. Accepts a number of rows or a percentage string.

settings.label: Visible list rows
settings.description: Number of list rows shown before scrolling in browse mode.
